description:
Worldwide Prayer Circle — Self-Realization Fellowship (founded 1920 by Paramahansa Yogananda). SRF, Los Angeles. A slim devotional booklet, “dedicated to the upliftment of humanity through prayer.” Cover: Earth from space.

A short booklet on the practice of the Worldwide Prayer Circle — healing prayer and group intention within the Yogananda lineage.

**Why a new owner would be happy**

- Of interest to anyone in the SRF / Yogananda / Autobiography of a Yogi lineage.
- Slim, light, and gentle — an easy add to a contemplative reader's shelf.

**Condition:** booklet; some surface scuffing and creasing to the dark cover.
name: Worldwide Prayer Circle
